# Copilot Planning Workflow

- For multi-file work, new features, migrations, or refactors, start with `/plan`.
- Do not skip directly to implementation when the goal, architecture, lifecycle, or acceptance criteria are still vague.
- Before deep planning, confirm whether the user wants a final-system build or a fast MVP.
- Planning depth must follow the chosen delivery mode:
  - final-system build -> deeper architecture and longer-horizon planning
  - fast MVP -> faster validated learning, but still explicit boundaries and acceptance
